name: part_005
file: tmp_【 超重大告知あり‼ 】 #桃鈴ねね誕生日ライブ2026 ～Liminal～【 桃鈴ねね ⧸ 3DLive 】 [YgZNZM81OcA]_gemini-3-flash-preview\reencoded\part_005.mov

scenes.description: Momosuzu Nene and Ookami Mio performing 'Friends' on a vibrant stage decorated with peaches and characters.
Transition scene with black screen and close-up of Momosuzu Nene with her eyes closed.
Momosuzu Nene performing 'Aozora no Rhapsody' joined by Ookami Mio and Ironmouse in a castle-themed stage.

subtitles.original: どこで壊れたの oh friends
subtitles.english: Where did it all fall apart, oh friends?

subtitles.original: うつむく日は 見つめあって
subtitles.english: On days we look down, we gaze at each other

subtitles.original: 指をつないだら oh friends
subtitles.english: When we held hands, oh friends

subtitles.original: 時が止まる 気がした
subtitles.english: I felt like time had stopped

subtitles.original: 二度と戻れない oh friends
subtitles.english: We can never go back, oh friends

subtitles.original: 他人よりも 遠く見えて
subtitles.english: You seem further away than a stranger

subtitles.original: いつも走ってた oh friends
subtitles.english: You were always running, oh friends

subtitles.original: あの瞳が 愛しい
subtitles.english: Those eyes are so dear to me

subtitles.original: Chu Chu Yeah!
subtitles.english: Chu Chu Yeah!

subtitles.original: Please Me!
subtitles.english: Please Me!

subtitles.original: Chu Chu Yeah!
subtitles.english: Chu Chu Yeah!

subtitles.original: Without You!
subtitles.english: Without You!

subtitles.original: あーなんてことだ お節介な過ちだ
subtitles.english: Ah, what a mess! An intrusive mistake

subtitles.original: 自分のことに タララッタラッて手を焼く
subtitles.english: I'm struggling with my own stuff, Tra-la-la-la

subtitles.original: 描写して苦戦 逃げ切っているでしょう
subtitles.english: Struggling to describe it, I guess I'm running away

subtitles.original: だけどなんだか 夕暮れ時になり そんな気分になっちゃって
subtitles.english: But somehow, as evening falls, I start to feel that way

subtitles.original: 始まりはそんなふうで つまりはらしくないようで
subtitles.english: It started like that, in a way that wasn't like me at all

subtitles.original: でも今じゃ扉開けてほら 声が聞こえるよ
subtitles.english: But now, look, open the door and I can hear your voice

subtitles.original: さあ 行こう！
subtitles.english: Now, let's go!

subtitles.original: どこへでも！
subtitles.english: Anywhere at all!

subtitles.original: 僕は君の翼に
subtitles.english: I have the courage to

subtitles.original: なれる勇気があるよ (Maybe!)
subtitles.english: Become your wings (Maybe!)

subtitles.original: どんな試練も怖くない その魔法があるから (Hurry!)
subtitles.english: No trial is scary because I have that magic (Hurry!)

subtitles.original: 初めて出会う世界に
subtitles.english: To the world we meet

subtitles.original: 花束を贈ろう (Maybe!)
subtitles.english: For the first time, let's give a bouquet (Maybe!)

subtitles.original: この瞬間が重なるよ
subtitles.english: These moments are overlapping now

subtitles.original: ちぐはぐなコミュニケーション
subtitles.english: Our mismatched communication

subtitles.original: でも別に構わない 明日から平和なら
subtitles.english: Doesn't really matter as long as tomorrow is peaceful

subtitles.original: Chu Chu Yeah!
subtitles.english: Chu Chu Yeah!

subtitles.original: Without You!
subtitles.english: Without You!

subtitles.original: あーどうしてまた 素直になれなくて
subtitles.english: Ah, why can't I be honest again?

subtitles.original: 自分のことで ジュルリッジュルリッ口を吹く
subtitles.english: Whistling about my own stuff, Jururi-jururi

subtitles.original: ギアはそのままで スピード上げていこう
subtitles.english: Keep the gear as it is, let's pick up the speed

subtitles.original: だけどなんだか 黄昏時になり いつか思い出しちゃって
subtitles.english: But somehow, as twilight falls, I remember it all

subtitles.original: 一人でいても 嫌じゃない
subtitles.english: I don't mind being alone

subtitles.original: 誰にも頼らなくてもいい
subtitles.english: I don't need to depend on anyone

subtitles.original: でも扉の向こう側が騒がしい 声が聞きたいよ 今
subtitles.english: But it's noisy on the other side of the door, I want to hear your voice now

subtitles.original: 行こう！
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: どこへでも！
subtitles.english: Anywhere at all!

subtitles.original: 僕は君を背中に
subtitles.english: I'll put you on my back

subtitles.original: 乗せて空を舞うよ (Maybe!)
subtitles.english: And soar through the sky (Maybe!)

subtitles.original: いつか心が離れても この時は笑ってね (Hurry!)
subtitles.english: Even if our hearts drift apart someday, please smile at this moment (Hurry!)

subtitles.original: 守りたいこの世界に
subtitles.english: In this world I want to protect

subtitles.original: 青空のラプソディ (Maybe!)
subtitles.english: Blue sky rhapsody (Maybe!)

subtitles.original: いつまででも 奏でていてよ
subtitles.english: Keep playing it forever

subtitles.original: でこぼこなコンビでしょ
subtitles.english: We're an uneven pair, aren't we?

subtitles.original: でも別に大丈夫さ 明日はまた平和なら
subtitles.english: But it's fine as long as tomorrow is peaceful again

subtitles.original: ほんの小さな傷を 太陽にさらして
subtitles.english: Exposing a tiny wound to the sun

subtitles.original: 分け合ったよ君と 痛みは暑さの中に
subtitles.english: I shared it with you, the pain melting away

subtitles.original: 溶けていく
subtitles.english: Into the heat

subtitles.original: Chu Chu Yeah!
subtitles.english: Chu Chu Yeah!
